title: nuttallia chrysantha
intro: Nuttallia chrysantha, also known as Chrysanthemum parviflorum, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Nuttallia chrysantha include its ability to relieve fever, reduce inflammation, and improve respiratory issues. Nuttallia chrysantha is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, or used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
